sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَتْ مَرْيَمُ القِرَاءَةَ فِي المَدْرَسَةِ هَذَا العَامَ.
sentences.translation: Merjem je ove godine naučila čitati u školi.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam learned to read at school this year.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَقْرَأُ الكَلِمَاتِ بِبُطْءٍ فِي البِدَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: U početku je čitala riječi polako.
sentences.translationEn: She read the words slowly at first.

sentences.arabic: مَعَ الوَقْتِ أَصْبَحَتْ تَقْرَأُ بِسُرْعَةٍ وَثِقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: S vremenom je počela čitati brzo i sigurno.
sentences.translationEn: With time she began to read quickly and confidently.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَتْ مَرْيَمُ قِصَّةً كَامِلَةً أَمَامَ الفَصْلِ.
sentences.translation: Merjem je pročitala cijelu priču pred razredom.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam read a whole story in front of the class.

sentences.translation: Učenici su joj zapljeskali dok se ona osmjehivala.
sentences.translationEn: The students clapped for her and she smiled.
